playbook.intent: Multi-platform launch chaos → sequenced PH + HN + IH + X + Reddit + Gumroad wave in one week.
playbook.scope: Coordinate a single product launch across Product Hunt, Hacker News, IndieHackers, X, Reddit, and Gumroad / Lemon Squeezy as a sequenced wave — not parallel spam — turning a one-day spike into a multi-day reinforcing campaign.

success-criteria.criterion: Each surface receives a tailored launch post
Paid product live on Gumroad or Lemon Squeezy

stage.name: Sequence
stage.intent: Define the wave: which surface fires which day.

tasks.task: Map each surface to a day in the launch week

stage.decision-gate: Advance once each surface has an owner-day and dependency.

stage.name: Tailor
stage.intent: Each surface gets a native-format post.

tasks.task: Write PH listing, HN post title, IH long-form, X thread, Reddit comment
Stage Gumroad / LS pages with launch pricing
Cross-link surfaces correctly to avoid duplicate-flag risk

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each surface post passes its native-format bar.

stage.name: Fire
stage.intent: Execute the sequence and respond live.

tasks.task: Trigger each surface on its scheduled day
Respond to every comment within 12 hours
Pull metrics nightly and adjust next day's surface

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the entire week ships.

stage.name: Compound
stage.intent: Spike converts to long-term audience and revenue.
stage.decision-gate: Done once spike has been captured in newsletter and revenue logged.

extra.value: [Paid acquisition layers, Cross-product launches in the same week, Parallel spam across surfaces]
[A shipping product with a live paid path, 'Accounts in good standing across PH, HN, IH, X, and Reddit']
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content micro-launch-stack-ph-hn-ih-x-same-week --format md, agent: faion get-content micro-launch-stack-ph-hn-ih-x-same-week --format context, json: faion get-content micro-launch-stack-ph-hn-ih-x-same-week --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
